headline: BEYOND THE GEN Z MYTH: FOUR DISTINCT LUXURY MINDSETS RESHAPING TRAVEL IN ASIA PACIFIC
summary: As Gen Z rises as a defining force in luxury travel, one long-held assumption no longer holds: there is no single Gen Z traveler. A new report from the Luxury Group by Marriott International in Asia Pacific excluding China (APEC), reveals a generation comprising four distinct luxury mindsets, with each redefining luxury on their own terms, from cultural immersion and personal wellbeing to digital disconnection and heritage-driven exploration.

headline: PLAMONDON HOSPITALITY PARTNERS HONORED WITH SECOND CONSECUTIVE MARRIOTT PARTNERSHIP CIRCLE AWARD
summary: Plamondon Hospitality Partners has once again achieved Marriott International's highest franchise honor, receiving the Partnership Circle Award. The accolade was presented to the company's leadership team at the annual Marriott Select Brands Owner & Franchisee CONNECT Conference, held this year in Las Vegas.

content.title: PLAMONDON HOSPITALITY PARTNERS HONORED WITH SECOND CONSECUTIVE MARRIOTT PARTNERSHIP CIRCLE AWARD

thumbnail.caption: Frederick-Based Hospitality Group Recognized in Las Vegas for Portfolio-Wide Operational Excellence and Employee-First Culture Built on Core Values.

headline: An Iconic Pairing: Marriott International and The Coca‑Cola Company Come Together in Strategic Beverage Agreement
summary: Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAR) and The Coca‑Cola Company (NYSE: KO) today announced a global agreement that will expand choice and elevate the guest experience across Marriott's portfolio, bringing The Coca‑Cola Company's brands to hotels around the world.

headline: Marriott and Coca-Cola announce global beverage partnership (MAR)
summary: Coca-Cola to become Marriott’s worldwide beverage supplierMarriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) and The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) have entered into a global beverage supply agreement that will see Coca-Cola products introduced across Marriott’s worldwide hotel portfolio. According to a joint announcement released on July 1, 2026, Coca-Cola will become Marriott’s global beverage partner across multiple categories, including carbonated soft drinks, hydration products and functional beverages.

According to a joint announcement released on July 1, 2026, Coca-Cola will become Marriott’s global beverage partner across multiple categories, including carbonated soft drinks, hydration products and functional beverages.

headline: Coca Cola (KO) Signs Marriott Deal Covering Nearly 10,000 Hotels Worldwide
summary: Coca-Cola and Marriott International have entered a global beverage supply partnership covering nearly 10,000 hotels worldwide. The agreement will see Coca-Cola brands offered across Marriott's global hotel network to international leisure and business travelers. This development expands Coca-Cola's reach into a large hospitality channel that had not been covered in recent Simply Wall St commentary. Coca-Cola, NYSE:KO, is moving deeper into the hospitality sector through this new deal with...
